summary: REQ-1 appears implemented by updating the Turkish subtitle string in `frontend/src/lib/translations.ts`. However, two additional files (`frontend-file-summaries.txt`, `project_state.json`) were modified without being requested in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified `frontend-file-summaries.txt` (documentation/summary content) even though the BuildRequest only asked for a translation string change.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-1 and not necessary to meet the acceptance criteria; BuildRequest scope is limited to updating `translations.tr.subtitle`.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified `project_state.json` by adding/updating project state entries related to marketing/store text.
hallucinated_features.reason: Explicit non-goal includes not updating Google Play Console store listing text; additionally, changing project state tracking was not requested by REQ-1.
